verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Surely goodness and mercy will follow me all of my life, And I will dwell in the house of the Lord forever Surely goodness and mercy will follow me all of my life, And I will be satisfied with the good things of Your house.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are filling my heart with gladness You are filling my mouth with praise You are filling my heart with gladness And Your presence is filling my days.
